quote.msg: 首先肯定唔會係由連登仔發現

replies.msg:
10^248

Suppose the smallest measurement length unit is planck length(普朗克長度)，which is 10^-35 meters
Suppose the smallest measurement time unit is planck time(普朗克時間)，which is 10^-44 meters

Observable universe(已知宇宙) is 93 billion light year(930億光年)， i.e., 10^27 meters

Observable universe length = 10^27/10^-35 = 10^62 planck length

Observable universe volume = （10^62）^3 = 10^186 planck volume

History of universe = 13.8 billion years = 138億年 = 10^18秒 = 10^62 planck time

By multiply observble universe in planck volume and history of univeese in planck time
= 10^186 * 10^62
= 10^248 planck unit

quote.msg: tree(3)

首先肯定唔會係由連登仔發現
10^248

Suppose the smallest measurement length unit is planck length(普朗克長度)，which is 10^-35 meters
Suppose the smallest measurement time unit is planck time(普朗克時間)，which is 10^-44 seconds

Observable universe(已知宇宙) is 93 billion light year(930億光年)， i.e., 10^27 meters

Observable universe length
= 10^27/10^-35
= 10^62 planck length

Observable universe volume
= （10^62）^3
= 10^186 planck volume

History of universe
= 13.8 billion years
= 138億年
= 10^18 seconds
= 10^62 planck time

By multiply observble universe in planck volume and history of universe in planck time
= 10^186 * 10^62
= 10^248 planck unit


And suppose the God need 100 TB （10^14 bytes or 10^15 bits） to store 1 planck length in 1 planck time, and have 10 billion （10^10）copies
= 10^186 planck volume * 10^62 planck time * 10^ 15 bits * 10^10 copies
= 10^273 bits
